name: Tex-Mex Tamale Pie
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Tomatoes sauce or Chopped, canned tomatoes
2 lbs Lean ground meat (beef or turkey)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy frying pan or kettle, lightly brown the meat in olive oil.
2. Stir in onions and green pepper, and cook until limp.
3. Add tomato sauce, corn, chili powder, salt, cumin, garlic, and oregano. Simmer for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Prepare the corn mixture (Batter 1):
a. In a saucepan, mix cornmeal, powdered milk, and salt.
b. Gradually stir in water. Cook over low heat until the mixture thickens and bubbles, about 10 to 15 minutes.
5. Spread about half of the batter over the bottom of a greased 9 x 12-inch baking pan.
6. Spoon the meat mixture evenly over the top.
7. Spoon remaining corn mixture over the meat mixture.
8. Sprinkle with cayenne and olives.
9. Prepare the second corn mixture (Batter 2):
a. Mix the corn muffin mix with cold milk (more than specified on the package) until it has pancake batter consistency.
10. Spread about half of this batter over the bottom of another greased 9 x 12-inch baking pan.
11. Spoon the meat mixture evenly over the top.
12. Spoon remaining corn mixture over the meat mixture.
13. Sprinkle with cayenne and olives.
14. Bake uncovered in a moderate (350°F) oven for about 30 minutes.
